@sigil v0 hybrid
G: fix(auth_mw_expiry_skew30_boundary_refresh_loop)
C: expMs<nowMs∧nowMs-expMs<=30000
H: edge(-30s_200) ∧ edge(-31s_401)
P: skew30_only→allow_30s_grace_else_401
V: keep_401∧reg_t
R: !refresh_loop
A: reg_t

[AUDIT]
Goal: fix(auth_mw_expiry_skew30_boundary_refresh_loop).
Constraints: expMs<nowMs and nowMs-expMs<=30000.
Hypothesis: edge(-30s_200) and edge(-31s_401).
Plan: skew30_only then allow_30s_grace_else_401.
Verify: keep 401 behavior and regression test.
Risk: high-risk refresh_loop.
Answer target: regression test.

G: fix(refresh_rotation_race)
C: refresh_token∧409∧parallel_refresh
H: old_refresh_token replay can hit reuse(old_refresh_token)=>409 repeatedly under concurrent refresh
P: if replay_detected_once(old_refresh_token) then reject_current_request(409) ∧ mark_token_family_compromised_once ∧ suppress_repeat_409_for_same_replay
V: single_replay⇒single_409

G: fix(webhook_verify_timestamp_skew)

C: abs(now-ts)>300∧provider_skew≤30
H: edge(-30s_200)∧edge(-31s_401)
P: abs(now-ts)≤330→200
V: 300<abs(now-ts)≤330∧provider_skew≤30
R: !allow_general_skew>30

A: min_fix

fix(expiry_ms_sec_once):
  C: exp∈{ms,sec} ∧ now∈sec
  H: normalize exp once before compare
  P: exp_ms→exp_sec = exp_ms/1000
  V: exp_sec ∧ (exp<now ↔ 401)
  R: !fresh_token_reject(ms/sec mismatch)
  A: add edge(-30s_200

@sigil v0 hybrid
G: fix(ttl_boundary_freshness)
C: age>=ttl ∧ exact_boundary(304/etag) ∧ stale_loop
H: cached ∧ response ∧ marked ∧ stale ∧ at ∧ age==ttl ∧ forcing ∧ perpetual ∧ revalidation
P: treat ∧ age==ttl ∧ as ∧ fresh ∧ for ∧ serve-path ∧ stale ∧ only ∧ when ∧ age>ttl
V: age==ttl → serve_cached ∧ no_revalidate
R: !age>=ttl ∧ as ∧ stale
A: reg_t

[AUDIT]
Goal: fix(ttl_boundary_freshness).
Constraints: age>=ttl and exact_boundary(304/etag) and stale_loop.
Hypothesis: cached and response and marked and stale and at and age==ttl and forcing and perpetual and revalidation.
Plan: treat and age==ttl and as and fresh and for and serve-path and stale and only and when and age>ttl.
Verify: age==ttl then serve_cached and no_revalidate.
Risk: high-risk age>=ttl and as and stale.
Answer target: regression test.

@sigil v0 hybrid
G: fix(edge(-30s_200)) ∧ fix(edge(-31s_401)) ∧ fix(keep_401)
C: now>reset→allow
H: release ∧ exactly ∧ at ∧ reset ∧ once
P: retry-after∧429→single_wait
V: reset_window∧no_retry_storm
R: !double_release
A: reg_test

[AUDIT]
Goal: fix(edge(-30s_200)) and fix(edge(-31s_401)) and fix(keep 401 behavior).
Constraints: now>reset then allow.
Hypothesis: release and exactly and at and reset and once.
Plan: retry-after and 429 then single_wait.
Verify: reset_window and no_retry_storm.
Risk: high-risk double_release.
Answer target: reg_test.

G: fix(public_ping_401)
C: public_ping ∧ !session ∧ auth_guard
H: healthcheck_bypass
P: public_ping ∧ !session → 200
V: ping_401 ∧ session_missing ∧ healthcheck_ok
R: !session → 401 except public_ping/healthcheck
A: verify edge(-31s_401) edge(-30s_200) keep

@sigil v0 hybrid
G: fix(overdue=>402, grace24h, boundary_charge_loop)
C: overdue ∧ billing_middleware ∧ 24h ∧ 402
H: charge_loop ∧ boundary_edge
P: overdue→402 ∧ grace24h→permit_until(+24h) ∧ boundary→single_charge
V: exact_24h ∧ no_double_charge
R: !charge_loop
A: reg_t

[AUDIT]
Goal: fix(overdue implies 402, grace24h, boundary_charge_loop).
Constraints: overdue and billing_middleware and 24h and 402.
Hypothesis: charge_loop and boundary_edge.
Plan: overdue then 402 and grace24h then permit_until(+24h) and boundary then single_charge.
Verify: exact_24h and no_double_charge.
Risk: high-risk charge_loop.
Answer target: regression test.
